member.summary: EF Core database context that hosts Identity and domain entities.

member.summary: Gets the users aggregate set.

member.summary: Gets roles.

member.summary: Gets permissions.

member.summary: EF Core configuration for the domain user aggregate.

member.summary: EF Core configuration for permissions.

member.summary: EF Core configuration for roles.

member.summary: EF Core configuration for role-permission assignments.

member.summary: EF Core configuration for user-role assignments.

member.summary: Registers persistence services.

member.summary: Adds EF Core, Identity, repositories, and unit of work.

member.summary: ASP.NET Core Identity user record linked to the domain user aggregate.

member.summary: Gets or sets the linked domain user identifier.
